titleStmt.title: SII 26.409: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 409. (A.R. No. 388 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva: Year 36 or 31 = 1100-01 A.D. or 1105-06 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 2500 kuḻi of land as tax-free maḍappuṟam to provide for food-offerings to the Āṇḍārgaḷ praying in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēśam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu, by a certain woman Sūryyadēvi alias Niṉṟatavañjeidāḷ, wife of Nānūṟṟuvan Malaiyamān alias Rājēndrachōḷachchēdirāyan of Kiḷiyūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi (see No. 422 below), after purchasing the land from the sabhai (assembly) of Śiṟṟiṅgūr. Also records a gift of nattam land, purchasing it from the Brāhmaṇa Bhāradvāji Kumārasvāmipārāyaṇan and others, by the same Sūryyadēvī.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Āvatu malāṭākiya jaṉanāta
vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattu brahmadecam ciṟṟiṅkūr sabhaiyom Āḷuṭai yār tiruppulippakavatevar koyilil kumpiṭ
ṭirun=ta Āṇṭārkaḷ Amutuceytaruḷukaikku maṭappuṟam cantrātittavaṟ celkaikku niban=tamākat tirumuṉaippāṭik kiḷi
yūr mayyamāna nānūṟṟuvan malaiyamānāṉa rājentracoḷaccetirāyan Akamuṭaiyāḷ Uṭaiyān sūyya devi
yāna niṉṟatavuñceytāḷ Iṟaiili maṭappuṟamāka koṇṭuviṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai tiruppulippakavan
vatikku meṟkum tenpākkellai Aimperuṅkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Āccipiṭāri kiḻvarampukkum tan
maccey kiḻvarampukkum tevatānam tiruvalakukuṇṭil kiḻvarampukkum nāṭakappaṅkukku kiḻvarampil kaṇṇikālukkum
kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai maturāntakan vāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicain=ta nāṟ per Ellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilam
patin Aṟu cāṇkolāl kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattaiñnūṟum Uḷnilam Oḻivinṟi Emmil Icain=ta vilaip
poruḷ Aṟakkoṇṭu Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟamākak kuṭuttom Itukku maṭṭum Iraṇṭukkum toṭṭap
paiyir ceykaikkum Ivvūr brāhmaṇan bhāradvāji kumārasvāmipārāyaṇana Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal sūyyadevi
yāna niṉṟatavuñ ceytāḷ vilaipporuḷ Aṟa Iṭṭukkoṇṭu viṭṭa nattattukku kiḻpārkellai māntoṭṭattu

kkoḻukku
tikku vaṭakkum melpā
rkkellai tiruppu
lipakavatikku kiḻakkil
sabhaiyār toṭṭa
ppoḻikku kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟkellai
tānan tamama
m Innāṟpār
ḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam maṭa
ppuṟamāka candrādittyavaṟ celvatāka
viṭṭom sabhaiyom
Digital edition of SII 26.409 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
